description: Letter to Aharon Rofe and Avraham Rofe. The address reads "to the teacher ʿAbd al-Wāḥid al-Yahūdī al-Ṭabīb in the Wikāla of K[...]." Unknown writer, unknown locations. Written in Judaeo-Arabic with the address in Arabic script. Apart from the greetings, the contents are cryptic. The writer reports that "The matter of Ibn Haman has resolved." Avraham Ṣaghīr sends his regards. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
